text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win every race!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'll do things my way, and at my own pace!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my very best and cut no corners
when it comes to taking care of my body.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Mumumumuuu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Bwaaa! Th-the shrine bell fell down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have another bustling New Year's Day with
Matikanetannhauser and her friends this year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Hm, I think I'm okay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Still, that scared me. I wonder if my prayer got
through?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What did you pray for, Machitan?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, since we're starting our senior year, I'm
thinking I might try and do even bigger things this
year!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot of amazing racers this year. If I'm
not at the top of my game, everyone's going to
leave me in the dust.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is aiming for her third consecutive
spring Tenno Sho win and Palmer has been
making a splash in the G1 scene.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot of attention on Flower as well. Her
performance in the Sprint tour has been
extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Everyone competing in the Classics this year is
incredible too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Like Hayahide, Ticket, and Taishin. Oh, I'm so
excited!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You find that exciting, huh? You sure haven't
changed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
By the by, Tannhauser. Do you have some kind of
goal for the year?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Besides winning every race, I mean!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I do, but it's kinda embarrassing, so it's a secret.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later in the evening, Matikanetannhauser stops
me as we're about to part ways.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um, there's something I want to say that's for
your ears only.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's about my goal. This year, I... I want to
find myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've been thinking about what the director
said at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get what she meant when she said I
inspire people because I'm me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm me... Like, what? It makes me all
fidgety just thinking about it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I think that's because I don't really understand
myself very well to begin with.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If I want to live up to the director's expectations,
then I need to understand myself first!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I'm gonna use this year to find
myself!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So let's work really hard! How should we kick
things off?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The perfect training for today is...
choice_data_list: Let's start by preserving your stamina!
Since we're here, let's do a full regimen!

Let's usher in the new year with some enemy
recon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! But it's the very first day!
choice_data_list: And let's use it to rest.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That means we'll go all out starting tomorrow,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! I'm already plenty motivated! In that
case, I'll take your advice and save my energy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! Time to sleep!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we start this year's training rather
peacefully.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
A full regimen! You mean going back and forth
between the track, gym, and pool?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sounds fun! Where should I start? Oh, it's so hard
to decide!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I know! I'll make my own decision spinner! My first
test of luck for the year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we start this year's training rather
peacefully.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ooooh! I love a good stealth mission!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And I've got the perfect plan—I'll disguise myself
as a bush and head to the track!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, but while I'm at it, what if I dressed up as a
ninja bush?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we start this year's training rather
peacefully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many tough opponents await us in our senior
year. I want us to do everything we can to beat all
of them!
